news_items.headline: Cardinals grind their way to a win over the Diamondbacks
news_items.summary: Baseball is back. More importantly, the St. Louis Cardinals are back. After the excitement of the Home Run Derby was enough to last us until Friday, it was good to see the full team back in action. The layoff did not hurt the offense early in the first game of a three-game series against the […]
